evals.description: Agent correctly uses get-token with form-encoded body (not JSON) for password grant
Agent uses form-encoded (not JSON) body for refresh_token grant
Agent references isSuccess (not success) when checking response envelopes
Agent uses itemId for user/org/credential operations (not id)
Agent uses language for user fields (not languageName)
Agent uses verificationCode, mfaId, authType, projectKey, isFromTokenCall for verify-otp
Agent uses userId, projectKey, mfaType, sendPhoneNumberAsEmailDomain for generate-otp
Agent handles {data, errors, totalCount} response envelope for list endpoints
Agent correctly routes OIDC client CRUD operations to save/get/delete-oidc-client actions
Agent uses SaveClientCredential + Token endpoint for machine-to-machine auth
Agent correctly routes SSO credential CRUD to save/get/delete-sso-credential actions
Agent constructs OIDC authorize URL with correct query params
Agent retrieves and uses openid-configuration for OIDC discovery
Agent uses body (not query params) for GetUserTimelines endpoint
Agent uses Sort.Property and Sort.IsDescending query params for GetSessions
Agent uses isEmailPasswordSignUpEnabled and isSSoSignUpEnabled fields correctly
Agent uses GetPermissionsGroupBySeverity for permission grouping
Agent correctly uses OrganizationMembership {organizationId, roles[], permissions[]} in user requests
